---
title: "Noah Pearl"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/n-pearl
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/noah-pearl-472489290/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:noahpearl@ucsb.edu
---

Statistics and data science undergrad at UC Santa Barbara, headed toward
biostatistics research. I like the theory and I like building things that
use it to help real people.

Right now I'm doing biostatistics research through ISI-BUDS at UC Irvine,
working primarily in R for public health. Notes and projects are in the nav above.
